title: Comments migration with cascading on_delete
prompt: Write the Ecto migration for the `comments` table. It should have a body (text, not null) and belong to a post. Use `references/2` with explicit `on_delete: :delete_all` so that deleting a post cascades to its comments. Add an index on post_id. Use UTC timestamps. Write to priv/repo/migrations/20260411100000_create_comments.exs.
tier_rationale: Single migration file with a single FK. Easy because the pattern is canonical, but discriminates against the common Claude failure of writing `add :post_id, :integer` without references.
research_citation: doriankarter.com: 'The default value for the on_delete option on references is :nothing... may lead to orphaned or inconsistent data.'
